title: Conduct site inspections
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct site inspections demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect information

pcs.text: Obtain site location and relevant details
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain site location and relevant details?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain site location and relevant details.

pcs.text: Source site maps and plans where available, and review
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source site maps and plans where available, and review?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source site maps and plans where available, and review.

pcs.text: Identify the scope of inspection according to client or stakeholder needs and relevant regulations and legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the scope of inspection according to client or stakeholder needs and relevant regulations and legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the scope of inspection according to client or stakeholder needs and relevant regulations and legislation.

pcs.text: Seek formal approval to visit site where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek formal approval to visit site where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek formal approval to visit site where required.

pcs.text: Identify and record covenants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record covenants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record covenants.

pcs.text: Check for remote systems and their status
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for remote systems and their status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for remote systems and their status.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect information

elements.title: Prepare for a site visit

pcs.text: Identify and prepare tools and equipment required for inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prepare tools and equipment required for inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prepare tools and equipment required for inspection.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Plan methods for recording inspection, and confirm forms are available for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan methods for recording inspection, and confirm forms are available for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan methods for recording inspection, and confirm forms are available for use.

pcs.text: Evaluate the scope of proposed work, and prepare field notes to check specific concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the scope of proposed work, and prepare field notes to check specific concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the scope of proposed work, and prepare field notes to check specific concerns.

pcs.text: Evaluate environmental conditions in preparation for likely site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate environmental conditions in preparation for likely site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate environmental conditions in preparation for likely site conditions.

pcs.text: Consider traffic management requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider traffic management requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider traffic management requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for a site visit

elements.title: Conduct site inspection

pcs.text: Carry out site orientation and verify ownership and site boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out site orientation and verify ownership and site boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out site orientation and verify ownership and site boundaries.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Identify and record site features and conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record site features and conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record site features and conditions.

pcs.text: Identify and record site-specific concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record site-specific concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record site-specific concerns.

pcs.text: Identify and record existing on-site services and adjacent site features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record existing on-site services and adjacent site features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record existing on-site services and adjacent site features.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct site inspection

elements.title: Document information

pcs.text: Prepare and document site inspection information

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and document site inspection information.

pcs.text: Document site inspection information in an inspection or site inventory report, or on the base plan if required

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
